archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified per user request for Linear/Vercel styling

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#0A0A0A]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight text-[#0A0A0A]

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers with borders. Optical alignment over geometrical.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Children must stretch (h-full).
spacing_and_layout.cards: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-black/5 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#7C3AED] text-white hover:bg-[#6D28D9] rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#7C3AED]/50 focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-black/10 hover:bg-black/5 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black/10 focus:outline-none

motion.page_transition: framer-motion opacity-0 y-4 to opacity-100 y-0 duration-500
motion.stagger_children: delay-100, delay-200, delay-300 for list items

components.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 glassmorphism surface. Must have logo, navigation, and CTA. Do not use hamburger menu on desktop.
components.editor: Monaco Editor with 'vs-light' theme. Wrapper must have border-black/10, rounded-xl, and overflow-hidden.
components.dashboard_grid: Use bento grid layout for rooms. High density but clean typography.
components.ai_panel: Floating right panel or integrated tab. Use subtle gradient borders or glassmorphism to distinguish AI features.
components.rage_meter: Visual indicator. Use SVG or animated div. Low=Green/Blue, Medium=Orange, High=Red with subtle shake animation.

hero_background.description: Abstract purple and teal curved shapes on white background. Use as a subtle, low-opacity background behind the hero section or decorative element.

team_collaboration.description: Two men sitting at a table looking at a laptop. Use in 'About' or 'Collaboration' feature section.

company_logo_placeholder.description: Minimalistic square logo with a black letter. Use for user avatars or mock integrations if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components use `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
Use Shadcn UI for complex interactive components (Dialogs, Dropdowns, Tabs).
Build standard layouts (Landing page hero, bento grids) with raw HTML + Tailwind for complete creative control.
Implement Monaco Editor explicitly setting the theme to 'vs-light'.
Ensure high contrast for text (APCA standard). Do not use pure gray text on gray backgrounds.
Implement glassmorphism using `backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70` with a `border-black/5` 1px border. Do not use muddy gray transparency.
